app.name: Rulyx
onboarding.title: Bluesky moderation made easy (TR)
onboarding.subtitle: Free  ·  Open source  ·  No ads  ·  No tracking (TR)
onboarding.moderation.title: Moderation (TR)
onboarding.moderation.desc: Browse lists, search for actors, import or export members, and compare lists. (TR)
onboarding.profile.title: Profile (TR)
onboarding.profile.desc: Inspect profiles, view labels and stats, and perform moderation actions. (TR)
onboarding.settings.title: Settings (TR)
onboarding.settings.desc: Manage accounts, clear cache, and review data classification. (TR)
onboarding.info.title: Info (TR)
onboarding.info.desc: Learn about the app, review workflows, and access privacy information. (TR)
onboarding.accounts.title: Accounts (TR)
onboarding.accounts.desc: Switch between saved accounts, add new accounts, and manage account labels. (TR)

account.switcher.hint: Opens account switcher to change or manage accounts (TR)
settings.title: Settings (TR)
settings.clear_cache.confirm: Clear cached network and image data? (TR)
settings.clear_cache.message: Saved accounts and app passwords will not be removed. (TR)
info.keychain.title: Keychain-secured (TR)
info.keychain.desc: Account secrets never leave your device. All API calls go directly to your Bluesky PDS. (TR)
info.clearsky.desc: Blocking and blocked-by data is provided by ClearSky. ClearSky indexes block records from the Bluesky firehose and makes them available via a public API. No authentication is required. (TR)
info.legal.author: Author (TR)
lists.no_account.title: No Active Account (TR)
lists.no_account.desc: Add a Bluesky account in the Accounts tab to load lists. (TR)

pending.empty.title: No Pending Actions (TR)
pending.empty.desc: Long-running operations like blocking followers will appear here. (TR)
account.add.title: Add Account (TR)
account.add.password_hint: The app stores the password securely in the iOS Keychain and uses it for Bluesky account access. (TR)

list.detail.delete_message: This permanently deletes the list and all its members. This cannot be undone. (TR)

list.members.no_matches_desc: No existing members match the current filter. (TR)

profile.save_search.hint: Saves this search for quick access later (TR)
profile.add_account_first: Add and select an account first. (TR)
profile.no_lists: Bu profilin yer aldığı listeler burada görünecek.
profile.no_starter_packs: No owned starter packs available for membership comparison. (TR)

profile.result.hint: Shows detailed profile information for this account (TR)

list.detail.subscribe.label: Subscribe (TR)
list.detail.edit.label: Edit (TR)
list.detail.delete.label: Delete (TR)
list.detail.remove_message: This removes {count} selected member(s) from the list. (TR)
list.members.filter_accessibility: Filter members by handle or name (TR)
list.compare.title: Compare and Transfer (TR)
list.compare.no_lists_desc: Create additional lists to use comparison and transfer tools. (TR)
list.compare.help_overlap: Overlap: members present in both lists. (TR)
list.compare.help_only_current: Only in current list: members unique to this list. (TR)
list.compare.help_only_other: Only in comparison list: members in the other list but not this one. (TR)
list.compare.help_copy: Copy adds selected members from the compared list to this list without affecting the source. (TR)
list.compare.help_move: Move transfers selected members from this list to the other, removing them from this list. (TR)
list.snapshot.title: Snapshot History (TR)
list.snapshot.no_changes: No membership changes in this comparison. (TR)
list.snapshot.help_1: Snapshots capture the full membership of this list at a point in time. (TR)
list.snapshot.help_2: Use the pickers to compare two historical snapshots and see what changed. (TR)
list.snapshot.help_3: New snapshots are created automatically after bulk operations. (TR)
list.snapshot.help_4: The diff shows exactly which members were added or removed between snapshots. (TR)
list.snapshot.help_5: Snapshots are stored locally and tied to this workspace. (TR)
list.import.title: Import Handles (TR)
list.import.paste_section: Paste Handles, DIDs, or Profile URLs (TR)
list.import.help_3: CSV rows with handles, DIDs, or profile URLs (TR)
list.import.help_5: Duplicate and already-present entries will be detected before import. (TR)
list.import_preview.title: Import Review (TR)
list.import_preview.skip_note: Already-present accounts will be skipped during import. (TR)
list.import_preview.help_ready: Ready: These accounts will be added to the list. (TR)
list.import_preview.help_already: Already in List: These accounts are already members and will be skipped. (TR)
list.import_preview.help_duplicate: Duplicate: Multiple entries in your import resolve to the same account. (TR)
list.import_preview.help_unresolved: Unresolved: These identifiers could not be found on Bluesky. (TR)
list.import_preview.help_write: Importing writes to the live Bluesky list immediately. (TR)
list.edit.title: Edit List (TR)
rel.block_message: Blocking prevents interaction and is treated as a destructive moderation action. (TR)
list.subscribe.error_uri: Enter a list AT URI or URL. (TR)

settings.icloud.enabled_footer: Account handles and labels sync across your devices. App passwords stay on each device for security.
settings.icloud.disabled_footer: Enable to keep your account configuration consistent across devices.
settings.biometric_footer: Lock the app with {biometric} when it goes to the background.
settings.gif_services_desc: Add API keys from GIPHY, Tenor, and Imgur to search and post GIFs in your timeline. Get keys from developers.giphy.com, developers.google.com/tenor, and api.imgur.com.
profile.block_all_warning: Warning: This will block every follower of this account. Use with caution.

info.feature.lists.browse: Kürasyon ve moderasyon listelerine satır içi arama ve filtreleme ile göz atın.
info.feature.lists.bulk: Üyeleri toplu olarak ekleyin, kaldırın, kopyalayın veya taşıyın — ilerleme takibi ile.
info.feature.lists.import: Metin, CSV veya dosyalardan kullanıcı adlarını içe aktarın — onay öncesi önizleme.
info.feature.lists.export: Üye listelerini ve fark sonuçlarını CSV olarak dışa aktarın.
info.feature.compare.compare: Listeleri karşılaştırın ve örtüşme, yalnızca-A ve yalnızca-B gruplarını görüntüleyin.
info.feature.compare.transfer: Seçilen üyeleri listeler arasında toplu olarak kopyalayın veya taşıyın.
info.feature.compare.export: Farkları çevrimdışı inceleme veya arşivleme için dışa aktarın.
info.feature.export.posts: Profil gönderilerini inceleme, paylaşma veya arşivleme için CSV ya da JSON olarak dışa aktarın.
info.feature.export.media: Tam önizlemeleri açmadan önce görselleri ve videoları hafif küçük resimlerle gözden geçirin.
info.feature.export.download: Seçilen medyayı oluşturulma zamanına dayalı dosya adları ve kısa hata raporuyla bir klasöre indirin.
info.feature.moderation.block: Profil detayından onay diyaloğu ile engelleyin veya sessize alın.
info.feature.moderation.block_all: Bir hesabın tüm takipçilerini engelle — arka plan görevi olarak çalışır.
info.feature.moderation.membership: Herhangi bir profilden doğrudan moderasyon listesi üyeliğini görüntüleyin ve değiştirin.
info.feature.audit.snapshots: Her yüklemede yerel liste anlık görüntüleri — herhangi ikisini karşılaştırın.
info.feature.audit.log: Toplu işlemlerin başarı ve başarısızlık sayımlarını içeren işlem günlüğü.
info.feature.audit.pending: İlerleme ve yeniden deneme ile çalışan görevleri gösteren bekleyen işlemler sayfası.
info.feature.audit.searches: Kaydedilen ve son profil aramaları oturumlar arasında kalıcıdır.
